title: XSS - HTML response built with string concatenation
description: Building HTML responses by concatenating user-controlled values into HTML strings allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks. An attacker can inject malicious scripts that execute in the victim's browser.
message: HTML response built with string concatenation - XSS risk if any operand contains user input (CWE-79).

noncompliant.description: HTML built with string concatenation - user input injected directly into HTML.

compliant.description: Use a template engine with auto-escaping enabled.
